---
title: "11_disease_trajectory"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(harmony)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
```

```{r}
#directores
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- c("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/") #hyak
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #mac studio
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #laptop
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

```{r}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r}
pb90_PT <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_PT_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

pb90_TAL <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_TAL_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)
```

```{r}
pb90_PT@reductions
DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  group.by = "group"
)

DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)

 DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p1 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p3 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
```
```{r}
cells_outlier <- WhichCells(
  pb90_PT,
  expression = umapTRIAD_1 < -4
)
```

```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=10}
p2 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "HAVCR1",
    "VCAM1",
    "LCN2",
    "KRT8",
    "KRT18",
    "VIM"
  )
)

p1 + p2

library(patchwork )
p3|p2
```


```{r}
pb90_PT <- AddModuleScore(
  pb90_PT,
  features = list(
    c("VCAM1", "KRT8", "KRT18", "VIM")
  ),
  name = "PT_injury"
)
```

```{r}
VlnPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  features = "PT_injury1",
  group.by = "group"
)
```

```{r}
injury_df <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c(
    "PT_injury1",
    "group",
    "record_id"
  )
)

injury_donor <- injury_df %>%
  group_by(record_id, group) %>%
  summarise(
    injury_score = mean(PT_injury1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)

 DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p1 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p3 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r fig.width=18}
p4 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "UMOD",
    "SLC12A1",
    "KCNJ1",
    "CLDN16",
    "VCAM1",
    "KRT18"),
  ncol = 2
)

p1 | p4
p3 | p4
```
